description_long: This object features a highly abstract and angular form, composed of intersecting planes and sharp edges, with a predominantly dark surface accented by occasional lighter and reddish tones. The structure appears fragmented, with several thin, elongated elements jutting out at various angles, giving it a dynamic, almost chaotic appearance. There are no discernible facial features, limbs, or traditional doll-like characteristics visible, and the overall silhouette is irregular and geometric. The surfaces are mostly flat and hard, with some areas reflecting light, suggesting a glossy or semi-glossy finish. The color palette is dominated by black, with hints of white and red visible in certain sections. The object does not display any visible clothing, accessories, or human-like features typically associated with dolls.
description: An abstract, angular doll with intersecting dark planes, sharp edges, and hints of red and white, lacking traditional facial or limb features.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the most complex arrangement of intersecting planes, with visible black, white, and red surfaces and several thin, pointed extensions.
description_view_1: View 1 is mostly white space with a single sharp, dark diagonal edge, revealing little detail of the object's structure.
description_view_2: View 2 displays a white background with a prominent black triangular point and a thin vertical dark edge, emphasizing the object's sharp geometry.
description_view_3: View 3 shows a mostly white surface with a single angled black edge, highlighting the minimalistic and abstract nature of the object.
attribute_clothing_style: No visible clothing or garments; the object is composed entirely of intersecting geometric planes with no textile patterns or fashion elements.
attribute_pose: No discernible body pose; the object lacks identifiable head, arms, legs, or torso, consisting solely of abstract, angular forms.
attribute_facial_expression: No visible facial features or expression present on the object.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair or hairstyle present on the object.
